scope: NATIVE wave batch A1 = M08K-T01 (custom object/entity/protocol lifecycle) + M08K-T03 (constraints/associativity AcDbAssoc*). Sub-batch of the program's MERGE-M08-NATIVE (K/L/M/N).

seam_extension.note: wired m08k/m08kc/m08l/m08m stubs + generalized reconcile family regex to multi-char unit tokens (m08kc)

pre_merge_integration.verified: m08k* (dictionary-lookup workaround) + m08kc* (AcDbAssoc*) coexist in the single TU, no static-symbol collision

drift_tracked.issue: m08k HasOp admits it but it is NOT a registry op id (the legislated op is extend.customentity.db_defaults, which IS implemented). Teammate duplicated db_defaults under both entity+object. Harmless dead handler (router never routes a non-registry op); registry-correct version works.
drift_tracked.disposition: scheduled for Batch C cleanup sweep (remove the spurious HasOp+Dispatch branch + test, rebuild). Does NOT affect closure_gate (counts registry ops only).

key_findings.m08k_dbx_export: The DBX import lib exports only the module extern-C API, NOT custom-class ::desc()/::cast() -> LNK2001 on 7 custom-class symbols. Fixed CHANGE_ONLY-safe via acrxClassDictionary->at(name) lookup + extern-C predicates; pinned by a test. Future families calling Ariadne custom-class ::desc()/::cast() directly will hit the same wall.
key_findings.m08kc_solver_discipline: Every assoc/constraint create wrapped in AcDbAssocNetworkEvaluationDisabler -> the network/array/surface SOLVER is never invoked. assoc-array create/edit deferred because createInstance's layout pass IS the evaluator.

post_merge_gate.build: combined integration build exit 0 (above); reconcile changed no C++

process_note: Parallel teammates (m08k-impl/m08kc-impl) each own worktree + ABSOLUTE paths -> no cwd collision. Both shut down cleanly after verification.
closure_note: closure_gate honestly False: 296 catalogued remain (NATIVE A2 L/M 82 + N 73 + VISLIVE/FALLBACK 45 + deferred 46 + drift 1). M09 blocked.
